report.summary: Cycle-close v7: No new commits since v6. TS errors up to 46 (from 42) — 4 new in crypto-arbitrage page. 482 published slugs, 103 still missing page.tsx. 740 uncommitted files, 7 days since last deploy — P0 deploy risk persists.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TYPESCRIPT: 46 errors across 3 files (up from 42 in v6). New errors in crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped > chars). Existing: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx, structured-data.examples.ts.
PAGE AUDIT: 482 published slugs, 379 have page.tsx (79%), 103 missing (served via dynamic routes or absent). No change from v6.
KNOWN 404s: /compare/exchanges and /trading still missing page.tsx — carried over from previous cycles.
LIVE VERIFICATION: Egress to degen0x.com blocked from this environment — cannot verify HTTP 200s on production pages.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: Zero commits since last cycle. Delta is limited to local TS error count increase from new page scaffold.
BUILD GATE: 46 TS errors are non-blocking for production build (Next.js builds despite these). Full build not re-run this cycle.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 API ROUTE FILES PRESENT: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, prices, defi-yields — all have route.ts locally.
CACHE TTLs (unchanged): fear-greed 10min, trending 5min, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 5min, prices 60s, defi-yields configurable. All use stale-while-revalidate at 2x.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/market-metrics route.ts exists locally but was never committed — still 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiting only on /api/health and /api/cache-stats. 6 core data routes remain unprotected.
LIVE HEALTH CHECK: Cannot verify — egress to degen0x.com blocked from this environment.

sections.title: DevOps
items: LAST DEPLOY: Commit e999560 (Mar 17) — 7 days since last deploy. No new commits this cycle.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 740 modified/untracked items (up from 738 in v6 — minimal delta, likely report files).
CRITICAL FILES UNCOMMITTED: middleware.ts and src/lib/published-pages.ts both have uncommitted changes.
DEPLOY RISK [P0]: 7 days and 740 files uncommitted. Core routing (middleware.ts) and indexing config (published-pages.ts) are not in production.
SITE STATUS: Cannot verify from this environment (egress blocked). Last confirmed live in v5 cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing new — no commits or page promotions since v6.
TOTAL PUBLISHED: 482 unique slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit and deploy immediately. 7 days of drift between local and production is critical risk.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 4 new TS errors in crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped > in JSX).
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Commit /api/market-metrics route.ts to fix production 404.
CARRY-OVER: Fix remaining 42 TS errors, wire rate limiters to core API routes, build /trading page, add JSON-LD to pages missing structured data.
